understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate through a grid-based level, modifying the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece by stepping on modifier tiles, in order to match the requirements of goal cells. Once all attributes match, stepping onto the goal cell completes it. The objective is to complete all goal cells in a level to progress, and ultimately finish all levels without running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is turn-based and grid-based. The piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape changers cycle the shape, color changers cycle the color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate when the piece's attributes exactly match the goal's requirements. You must then move onto the goal cell to complete it. Moving costs stamina. When stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets to a high value. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, and the player cannot move outside the grid.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate through a grid-based level, modifying the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece by stepping on modifier tiles, in order to match the requirements of goal cells. Once all attributes match, stepping onto the goal cell completes it. The objective is to complete all goal cells in a level to progress, and ultimately finish all levels without running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game is turn-based and grid-based. The piece has three attributes: shape, color, and rotation. Modifier tiles change these attributes: shape changers cycle the shape, color changers cycle the color, and rotation changers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells activate when the piece's attributes exactly match the goal's requirements. You must then move onto the goal cell to complete it. Moving costs stamina. When stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets to a high value. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, and the player cannot move outside the grid.
